chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1589 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6229/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of CMA No.6230/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 18.09.2025 Mr. Shahzado Dreho, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner by filing statement places on record certain documents, which are taken on record. Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner at the first instance intends to approach before the Complaint Redressal Committee constituted u/s 31 (Mechanism for Redressal of Grievances) of the Sindh Public Procurement Rules, 2010, for resolving his grievance against the respondents by filing Application / Complaint. He further submits that he would be satisfied, if the said committee is directed to decide his application / complaint, expeditiously in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. However, the Petitioner is at liberty to approach before the Complaint Redressal Committee, if such Application / Complaint is filed by the Petitioner, the same shall be decided in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
